productDisplayName: Puma Women Exsis 2 White Blue Shoe
description: Get used to superior comfort and performance during runs with these Cell Exsis 2 shoes from puma. These shoes work as hard as you to help you run better and look great doing it. Team these with jeans and tees for a cool casual look.Upper Mesh upper with synthetic overlays for a high degree of breathability and stability Formstripe and cat logo on the sides for added comfort and style Lace-ups for snug Fit Padded collar and tongue for plush feel Midsole EVA midsole for superior cushioning and improved shock absorption Outsole ArchTec technology to guide the foot through a natural transition from touch-down to toe-off Long-lasting CELL unit in the heel for improved shock absorption EverTrack, a long-lasting composite used in the outsole to provide durability in high-wear areas Outsole with aggressive pattern and flex grooves for more flexibility to the feet
